expectations.text: Shows theme distribution for detractors ranked by count
expectations.evidence: Table with 13 themes ranked by count: Slow Speed (48), Frequent Disconnections (44), General Negative (41), down to Bad Technician (1) and Unclassified (58)
Slow Speed: 5 verbatims, Frequent Disconnections: 7 verbatims, General Negative: 6 verbatims, Complaint Resolution: 5 verbatims, Internet Down: 4 verbatims

expectations.text: Preserves original Hindi/Hinglish language in verbatims
expectations.evidence: All Hindi/Hinglish verbatims preserved in original script with English translations in parentheses. Includes both Devanagari and romanized Hindi.

expectations.text: Each verbatim includes score, channel, theme metadata
expectations.evidence: Every verbatim prefixed with [NPS X | Detractor | Theme | Sprint 14 | Channel] format

expectations.text: Notes sample size and data source
expectations.evidence: Header: 'Sample Size: 241 detractors (scores 0-6) with feedback'. Methodology section notes evocativeness formula and language preservation approach.

notes: Strong qualitative output. Sentiment Highlights section adds genuine analytical value beyond just listing verbatims. Evocativeness scoring formula correctly cited. 24% unclassified rate honestly reported.
